name: Crossroads Community Garden
description: Community P‑Patch garden with ornamental plantings, flowering shrubs, and a water feature. High early‑season forage potential.

name: Lake Hills Greenbelt Community Garden
managed_by: Lake Hills Greenbelt Urban Agriculture Program
description: Urban agriculture and demonstration garden with community plots, fruit trees, and pollinator habitat.

name: Goddard Park
description: Rose garden and ornamental plantings. Strong early‑season flowering potential.

name: Wildwood Park
description: Flower garden, wooded trails, and edge habitat ideal for mason bees.

name: Evergreen Park
description: Flower garden with seasonal blooms and open lawn areas.

name: Wilburton Hill Community Park
description: Large upland park with forest edges and trail corridors — prime mason bee habitat.

name: Weowna Park
description: Old‑growth forest remnants, riparian edges, and early‑season flowering understory.

name: Spiritwood Park
description: Wooded trails and edge habitat with diverse flowering shrubs.

name: Robinsglen Nature Park
description: Wildlife habitat with open viewpoints and flowering native shrubs.

name: Burrows Landing
description: Lakefront viewpoint with flowering shoreline vegetation.
